HED.prologue: The HED SLAM(Sensor Location and Motion) HED library schema is designed to standardize the annotation of sensor locations and human motion across recording modalities and diverse fields.

node.name: Anatomical-landmark
node.description: A collection of specific points on the human body used for anatomical and sensor placement reference.

node.name: Abdomen-landmark
node.description: Points on the abdomen used as reference landmarks.

node.name: Anterior-Superior-Iliac-Spine-ASIS
node.description: The forwardmost point of the iliac crest.

node.name: Posterior-Superior-Iliac-Spine-PSIS
node.description: The rearmost point of the iliac crest.

node.name: Umbilicus
node.description: The navel or belly button.

node.name: Foot-landmark
node.description: Points on the foot used as reference landmarks.

node.name: Calcaneal-Tuberosity-CT
node.description: The bony prominence at the heel.

node.name: First-Metatarsal-Head-FMH
node.description: The tip of the big toe.

node.name: Lateral-Malleolus-LM
node.description: The bony prominence on the lateral side of the ankle.

node.name: Medial-Malleolus-MM
node.description: The bony prominence on the medial side of the ankle.

node.name: Forearm-landmark
node.description: Points on the forearm used as reference landmarks.

node.name: Radial-Styloid-Process-RSP
node.description: The bony prominence on the radius bone at the wrist.

node.name: Ulnar-Styloid-Process-USP
node.description: The bony prominence on the ulna bone at the wrist.

node.name: Hand-landmark
node.description: Points on the hand used as reference landmarks.

node.name: Third-Metacarpophalangeal-Joint-MCP
node.description: The knuckle of the middle finger.

node.name: Head-landmark
node.description: Points on the head used as reference landmarks.

node.name: Inion
node.description: The most prominent point of the occipital bone at the back of the head.

node.name: Left-helix-tragus-junction-LHJ
node.description: The point where the helix meets the tragus of the left ear.

node.name: Mastoid-process
node.description: The process of the temporal bone behind the ear.

node.name: Midpoint-between-mastoid-processes-MMP
node.description: The midpoint between the mastoid processes.

node.name: Nasion
node.description: The midpoint between the eyes just above the bridge of the nose.

node.name: Right-helix-tragus-junction-RHJ
node.description: The point where the helix meets the tragus of the right ear.

node.name: Vertex
node.description: The highest point on the head in the midline.

node.name: Lower-leg-landmark
node.description: Points on the lower leg used as reference landmarks.

node.name: Tibial-Tuberosity
node.description: The bony prominence on the tibia at the knee.

node.name: Thigh-landmark
node.description: Points on the thigh used as reference landmarks.

node.name: Femur-Lateral-Epicondyle-FLE
node.description: The lateral epicondyle of the femur.

node.name: Femur-Medial-Epicondyle-FME
node.description: The medial epicondyle of the femur.

node.name: Greater-Trochanter
node.description: The large prominence at the proximal end of the femur.

node.name: Torso-chest-landmark
node.description: Points on the chest used as reference landmarks.

node.name: Acromion-process
node.description: The outermost point of the shoulder blade.

node.name: Suprasternal-Notch-Jugular-Notch
node.description: The notch at the top of the sternum.

node.name: Vertebra-prominens-C7
node.description: The seventh cervical vertebra at the base of the neck.

node.name: Xiphoid-process
node.description: The small cartilaginous process at the lower end of the sternum.

node.name: Upper-arm-landmark
node.description: Points on the upper arm used as reference landmarks.

node.name: Lateral-Humerus-Epicondyle-LHE
node.description: The lateral epicondyle of the humerus.

node.name: Medial-Humerus-Epicondyle-MHE
node.description: The medial epicondyle of the humerus.

externalAnnotation.name: dc:
externalAnnotation.description: An entity responsible for making contributions to the resource.

externalAnnotation.name: dc:
externalAnnotation.description: An entity primarily responsible for making the resource.

externalAnnotation.name: dc:
externalAnnotation.description: A point or period of time associated with an event in the lifecycle of the resource.

externalAnnotation.name: dc:
externalAnnotation.description: An unambiguous reference to the resource within a given context.

externalAnnotation.name: dc:
externalAnnotation.description: An entity responsible for making the resource available.

externalAnnotation.name: dc:
externalAnnotation.description: A related resource from which the described resource is derived.

externalAnnotation.name: dc:
externalAnnotation.description: A name given to the resource.

externalAnnotation.name: dc:
externalAnnotation.description: The nature or genre of the resource.

externalAnnotation.name: obogo:
externalAnnotation.description: Property indicating that an ontology term has a cross-reference to a database.

externalAnnotation.name: terms:
externalAnnotation.description: A legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource.
